title: gymnogyne elongata
intro: Gymnogyne elongata, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is primarily found in North America, particularly in the United States, and is known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. Gymnogyne elongata contains compounds such as gymnogenic acid, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations.
